use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF ACNE VULGARIS IN PATIENTS 9 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
ARAZLO™ (tazarotene) lotion, 0.045% is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in patients 9 years of age and
older.
